options.blogdescription: 営業力と人財力で、現場の成果まで設計する

steps.code:
<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';

// パーマリンク設定
global $wp_rewrite;
$wp_rewrite->set_permalink_structure('/%postname%/');
$wp_rewrite->flush_rules(true);

$pages = [
    [
        'title'   => 'ホーム',
        'slug'    => 'home',
        'content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/home"} /-->',
        'front'   => true
    ],
    [
        'title'   => '会社概要',
        'slug'    => 'company',
        'content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/company"} /-->'
    ],
    [
        'title'   => '採用情報',
        'slug'    => 'recruit',
        'content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/recruit"} /-->'
    ],
    [
        'title'   => 'お問い合わせ',
        'slug'    => 'contact',
        'content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/contact"} /-->'
    ],
    [
        'title'   => '個人情報保護方針',
        'slug'    => 'privacy',
        'content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"sigroup-theme/privacy"} /-->'
    ],
];

$front_id = 0;
foreach ($pages as $p) {
    // 既存削除
    $existing = get_page_by_path($p['slug']);
    if ($existing) wp_delete_post($existing->ID, true);

    $id = wp_insert_post([
        'post_title'   => $p['title'],
        'post_name'    => $p['slug'],
        'post_content' => $p['content'],
        'post_status'  => 'publish',
        'post_type'    => 'page',
    ]);
    echo ($id && !is_wp_error($id)) ? "OK: {$p['title']} (ID:{$id})\n" : "FAIL: {$p['title']}\n";

    if (!empty($p['front'])) $front_id = $id;
}

// ホームページ設定
if ($front_id) {
    update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
    update_option('page_on_front', $front_id);
    echo "Front page set: ID {$front_id}\n";
}

// パーマリンク再フラッシュ
$wp_rewrite->flush_rules(true);
echo "Done.\n";
?>
